short_description: Real-time GPS lot management for RV dealerships
full_description:
RV Trax helps RV dealerships track every unit on their lot in real-time using LoRaWAN GPS technology. Find any unit instantly, manage inventory status, handle work orders, and optimize your lot layout — all from your phone.

Features:
• Real-time GPS map with unit positions
• Barcode/QR scanning for quick unit lookup
• Work order management for porters and service staff
• Offline support — works even without internet
• Push notifications for alerts and assignments
• BLE/NFC tracker pairing

RV Trax is designed for lot porters, sales staff, service technicians, and managers who need to find and manage RV inventory quickly.

permissions.camera: Scan barcodes and QR codes on RV units
permissions.location: Show your position on the lot map
permissions.bluetooth: Pair with LoRaWAN GPS trackers via BLE
permissions.push_notifications: Receive alerts for unit movements and assignments
